name: Baidu AI Cloud
description: Baidus cloud platform (智能云) offering IaaS/PaaS plus ERNIE LLM, Qianfan MaaS, autonomous driving APIs and enterprise AI services.

seo.title: Baidu AI Cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Baidu AI Cloud: Baidus cloud platform (智能云) offering IaaS/PaaS plus ERNIE LLM, Qianfan MaaS, autonomous driving APIs and enterprise AI services.

when_to_use: Deploying ERNIE LLM via Qianfan MaaS for Chinese market apps
IaaS and AI infrastructure for China-based SaaS teams
Autonomous driving and perception APIs for vehicle developers
Hosting GPU workloads in a Baidu-managed cloud environment
Enterprise AI services tightly integrated with Baidu ecosystem

cons: English docs and support are limited
review.verdict: The clear AI cloud pick inside China, effectively unusable for teams serving Western markets.
review.best_for: Companies building AI products targeting users inside mainland China
review.not_for: Global SaaS teams needing English support and Western data residency
